title: network: add workaround for slirp4netns --enable-sandbox issue
body:
add a workaround for https://github.com/rootless-containers/slirp4netns/pull/153

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

@mheon @rhatdan this is also important for rootless otherwise they just explode with a newer slirp4netns
